Home → Discography → Mr. Ouija

Mr. Ouija

2011 · Siccness.Net

Bizzy Bone’s 2011 album Mr. Ouija is a tight, 10-track release issued independently through the Siccness.Net label. Named after one of Bone Thugs-n-Harmony’s most recognizable supernatural themes, the Ouija board’s spirit guide. The album consists of reworked versions of songs from the album Ruthless, which was released through the same label three years earlier.

"I can remember back in school, being judged by chicks, as soon I hooked up with the Bone Thugs, suddenly I´m the shhhh..."

— Hola
01 Word Up produced by Cairo Mayson ▷
02 Really Wanna Get High produced by Batkave ▷
03 Buckin Em Down produced by Brick Beats ▷
04 Hola produced by Batkave ▷
05 My Niggaz produced by Batkave ▷
06 If You a Gangsta produced by Slimm Capone ▷
07 Where You From Foo produced by Batkave ▷
08 Still Ain't Paid the Bounty produced by Slimm Capone ▷
09 Dream produced by Batkave ▷
10 I Remember produced by Loose Lyric ▷
